Table 3. Generalizability evaluation of the proposed DPT on diverse tabular datasets.
Table 1. Performance comparison on the ADNI test set. The best results and the second best are highlighted. Standard deviations are reported in subscript.

Fig. 1. Overview of our proposed PromptDx framework. A multimodal representation learning stage to acquire fused multimodal features from 3D MRI and tabular data, where specialized tabular embedding is built within the tabular encoder for structured data. The proposed DPT is applied for soft prompt tuning on fused features.
